description_long: This research institute building features a broad, low-profile rectangular structure with a flat roof and a central raised section, possibly housing a skylight or mechanical equipment. The exterior appears to be clad in a uniform, dark material, likely concrete or metal panels, giving it a modern and institutional appearance. A single, narrow vertical element runs along the length of the roof, possibly a structural or decorative feature. The building's footprint is expansive, suggesting a large interior space suitable for laboratories, offices, or collaborative research areas. There are no visible windows or doors from these views, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The overall aesthetic is utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal massing.
description: A large, flat-roofed research institute with a dark, uniform exterior and a central raised section, featuring minimalist, modern design elements.
description_view_0: The building is seen from a short end, highlighting the central raised section and the vertical line running along the roof.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the building's long, low profile and the continuous vertical element along the roof's length.
description_view_2: The opposite short end view again centers the raised section, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the elongated structure and central roof feature.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is not visible from any of the provided views, so details regarding its size, shape, materials, doors, steps, accessibility features, or decorative elements cannot be determined.
